title: Tropical Temptations Larana Yellow Italic
copyright_notice: Reference for design study. Not for redistribution.
typography_summary: Italic Cormorant-feel display + sans body + button sans
why_good: Italic display 'Tropical Temptations' (script italic + serif) Cormorant-feel — exactly Só Rio language
Yellow-warm-soft bg cria summer mood sem ser commercial
Garnish bem integrado (orange wheel + lemon twist) — ANTI-01 OK
Body copy + ORDER NOW respeitam hierarchy without dominating
caveats: ORDER NOW button é mais commercial que Só Rio quer. O resto é alinhado
